# drift-ui LLM Index

## Package
- name: @drift-ui/ui
- import: @drift-ui/ui
- style: @drift-ui/ui/styles.css

## Components
- Button: /components/button
- Input: /components/input
- Dialog: /components/dialog
- FormField: /guide/ai-snippets
- Card: /guide/ai-snippets

## AI Constraints
- Use semantic theme tokens only.
- Any built-in copy must use i18n key.
- Keep minimal diff and avoid cross-step implementation.

## Task Index
- forms-with-validation: Input + FormField + Button
- confirmation-dialog: Dialog + Button
- theme-toggle: createThemeProvider + useTheme
